think i lost to this before
Relatively easy to beat
You save ghelot AoE attack for tawil AoE barrier
Try to equip your wheel asap
When your combo is ready you kill hameln first to discard his wheel
Tawil will revive him but he is now useless so don't care about him anymore
Then you kill agrippa to remove her entwine since you know tawil used her revive then that mean she can't revive anymore until next reset
After that you kill tawil
And it's gg wp
